system.notes: Wearer is immune to Mind-Mould unless they are a Psyker. Sealed, and filtration systems provide +40 to Toughness Tests to resist harmful gases and +10 to resist extreme temperatures and being set on fire. Contains a separate rebreather that lasts 5 hours before needing replacement. Can be worn over armour. If it takes 5+ damage in a single round it becomes damaged and is no longer sealed.
